No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication or its specific targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health, well-being, or medical research.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a Master's program focused on thesis writing and advanced research methods, directly supporting quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and skills for employment/research (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: While SDG 1.b mentions 'gender-sensitive development strategies,' the course content itself lacks direct evidence for gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The reading '來自咖啡產地的急件' (Dispatches from the World of Fair Trade Coffee) provides a tangential link to promoting local products and decent work (Target 8.9).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course focuses on '學術的方式解答' and '創意解決的能力,' enhancing scientific research skills and innovation in social sciences (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course includes '批判理論' and '民族誌,' which are crucial for studying social inclusion and addressing inequalities (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The reading '社區如何動起來' (How Communities Move) by 楊弘任 suggests a focus on community development and participatory planning (Target 11.3).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The reading '來自咖啡產地的急件' (Dispatches from the World of Fair Trade Coffee) provides an example of sustainable consumption and production patterns (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: The course's emphasis on '系統思考' and '複雜系統論' provides foundational analytical skills for understanding and addressing complex global challenges like climate change (Target 13.2, 13.3).

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course aims to '掌握現象背後結構與運作邏輯的能力' and covers '研究倫理,' which are vital for developing effective, accountable institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's core objective is to build '研究方法' capacity, directly supporting effective and targeted capacity-building for SDG implementation (Target 17.9).
